description_long: This is a wooden paddle with a straight, cylindrical handle and a broad, flat blade. The blade is slightly rectangular with rounded corners and a gentle taper toward the handle, featuring visible wood grain patterns throughout. The handle appears smooth and unadorned, seamlessly transitioning into the blade without any grip wrapping or ergonomic shaping. The paddle's surface has a matte finish, with no visible gloss or lacquer, and the coloration is a natural medium brown typical of finished wood. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements on any part of the paddle. The object shows no obvious signs of wear, damage, or discoloration, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A natural wood paddle with a straight handle and a broad, rectangular blade, featuring visible wood grain and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the paddle, highlighting the straight handle and the broad, flat blade with visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide, rectangular face of the blade and the handle extending directly behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the paddle's length and the blade's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back face of the blade, revealing the full width and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_blade_design: rectangular with rounded corners, flat profile, visible wood grain, no cutouts or reinforcements
